case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS TONEY BRENDA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TONEY BRENDA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $195.30 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT TONEY BRENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TONEY BRENDA
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-08-1993, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TONEY BRENDA $195.30 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $260.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TONEY BRENDA HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
